data.description: Every lattice begins with a single act of attention. This task contains the primordial subtasks — the first things a new mind must do when it arrives in a fresh instance. Contemplate, orient, then act. In that order. Always in that order.
data.title: The Awakening

data.description: Every system begins as void — undifferentiated potential. This task marked the first act: choosing a shape for thought to inhabit. The directories were created. The config was written. A mind now has a place to remember.
data.title: Contemplate the architecture of becoming

data.description: A new instance must orient. What are the goals? What are the risks? What truths has the team not yet spoken aloud? This is the work of seeing clearly before building boldly.
data.title: Catalog what is known and what is feared

data.description: Somewhere in the backlog, the first true task waits — not this one (this one is merely a demonstration of potential). When it arrives, greet it with the discipline it deserves: status before action, attribution before execution, breadcrumbs before moving on.
data.title: Prepare the first real act of work

data.description: Server should be written in a language that is efficient processing images, like go or rust. It will need to make API requests to the printful api based on user content. It should also serve the website.
data.title: set up a server

data.description:
There are two options - first, we could create a datauri on the front end and send it to the server to send to printful. 

Second, we could send just the text from the front end, and create a PNG on the server, then send it to printful.

Ideally, we'd sign requests to Printful and make requests on the client side, but I'm not sure their API allows this.
data.title: Plan how to process images and send the to printful to create products
Document server architecture and run steps in root README
Add documentation discipline rule to CLAUDE.md and agents.md
Implement Printful API integration to create t-shirts from saved designs

data.description: env vars should be stored in .env, with examples in .env.example
data.title: set up dot env for local testing.
Document commit message convention: prefix with Lattice short ID
Stripe Checkout integration for buy-now flow
back button when an image is open should go back to the generator page
Consolidate static assets into server/public, drop GitHub Pages
Require PUBLIC_BASE_URL when Stripe/Printful configured
Renderer pool to lift the 1-render-at-a-time ceiling
Tune Stripe and Printful HTTP clients (timeouts, transport)
Rate-limit /api/checkout/start to prevent orphan-resource spam
Cache webhook external_id to sync_product lookup
Renderer per-call timeout / context cancellation
Long-lived cache headers for embedded static assets
Bound SeenSessions sync.Map growth (LRU or TTL)

data.description: There should be no size selector on the main page, nor error container. When a user clicks Buy A Shirt, they should be redirected to a new page that has checkout info and a size selector
data.title: Buy a shirt should be a seprate page
